nodes.name: 白頭海鵰
nodes.summary: 白頭海鵰（Bald eagle，学名 Haliaeetus leucocephalus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联12个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括湿地、沼泽、海岸湿地等4项，主要威胁包括农药污染、猎捕压力。
nodes.shortSummary: 白頭海鵰（學名：Haliaeetus leucocephalus；英語：Bald eagle），又名禿頭海鵰，俗稱秀鵰、禿頭鵰、白頭鵰或白頭鷹，是分佈於北美洲的大型猛禽。白頭海鵰有分為北部與南部的兩種亞種，並與白尾海鵰形成複合種。分佈於加拿大、美國全境以及墨西哥的北部。平常在大…

nodes.name: 海岸湿地
nodes.summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

nodes.name: Haliaeetus
nodes.summary: Haliaeetus（Haliaeetus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如玉带海雕、虎头海雕、白尾海雕等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: 阿留申群島
nodes.summary: 阿留申群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括帝雁、美洲绿翅鸭、短尾鹱等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 艾伯塔省

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.summary: 淡水与海水交汇形成的高生产力边缘生态系统。

nodes.name: 农药污染

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: leucocephalus.png | range_map_caption = Bald eagle range Star: accidental records }} The bald eagle (Haliaeetus leucocephalus) is a bird of prey found in North America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: At minimum population, in the 1950s, it was largely restricted to Alaska, the Aleutian Islands, northern and eastern Canada, and Florida. From 1966 to 2015 bald eagle numbers increased substantially throughout its winter and breeding ranges, and as of 2018 the species nests in every continental state and province in the United States and Canada. The majority of bald eagles in Canada are found along the British Columbia coast while large populations are found in the forests of Alberta, Saskatchewan, Manitoba and Ontario. Bald eagles also congregate in certain locations in winter

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|In flight during a licensed performance in Ontario, Canada thumb|During training at the Canadian Raptor Conservancy The bald eagle occurs during its breeding season in virtually any kind of American wetland habitat such as seacoasts, rivers, large lakes or marshes or other large bodies of open water with an abundance of fish

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|In flight during a licensed performance in Ontario, Canada thumb|During training at the Canadian Raptor Conservancy The bald eagle occurs during its breeding season in virtually any kind of American wetland habitat such as seacoasts, rivers, large lakes or marshes or other large bodies of open water with an abundance of fish

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It chooses sites more than from low-density human disturbance and more than from medium- to high-density human disturbance. However, bald eagles will occasionally nest in large estuaries or secluded groves within major cities, such as Hardtack Island on the Willamette River in Portland, Oregon, or John Heinz National Wildlife Refuge at Tinicum in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, which are surrounded by a great quantity of human activity. Even more contrary to the usual sensitivity to disturbance, a family of bald eagles moved to the Harlem neighborhood in New York City in 2010. While wintering, bald eagles tend to be less habitat and disturbance sensitive

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In the late 20th century it was on the brink of extirpation in the contiguous United States, but measures such as banning the practice of hunting bald eagles and banning the use of the harmful pesticide DDT slowed the decline of their population
